t_ch: 不要哭，没有高高的个子，像你这样，也可以做很多事。
t_en: Don't cry. Not tall, like you, can still do lots of things.

t_ch: 只要想去做，你肯定，也能做到。
t_en: If you want it enough, you will, definitely do it.

t_ch: 是吗…哎，还要锻炼多久，才能成为像白厄大人那样的英雄呢？
t_en: Really...? Ah, how much longer do I have to train to become a hero like Lord Phainon?

t_ch: 圣女赐福过的神圣水果，价格公道，数量有限，先到先得~
t_en: Fruits blessed by the Holy Maiden! Reasonably priced, limited quantity! First come, first served~

t_ch: …真是赐福过的？可我听说，圣女好久都没从房间里出来过了呀。
t_en: ...Were they really blessed? I heard that the Holy Maiden hasn't come out of her room for a long time.

t_ch: 哎，泰坦的力量岂是我们能理解的，说不定吹口气就算赐福呢？很神奇吧，别问，买就对了！
t_en: Hey, the power of the Titans is beyond our understanding. Maybe blowing a breath could count as a blessing? It's quite magical, right? Don't ask, just buy!

t_ch: 亲爱的，正好我有点口渴。不知道求神谕的队还要排多久，就买几个吧？
t_en: Dear, I'm a bit thirsty. I don't know how long the queue for the prophecy will take, so let's buy a few, okay?

t_ch: 好，给我们挑几个最光亮的吧，不够圆的不要。
t_en: Okay, pick the brightest ones for us. Pass the ones that aren't round enough.

t_ch: 各位虔诚的信徒们，现在我们看到的是泰坦火种的保存处。请勿大声喧哗，这里人多，注意别走散了！
t_en: Dear faithful followers, what we see here is the storage place for the Titan's Coreflame. Please don't speak loudly. It's crowded here, so be careful not to get lost!

t_ch: 命运圣城的风景…果然不一般啊。这趟朝圣老年跟团游，来得真值。
t_en: The Holy City of Fate's scenery... is truly extraordinary. This pilgrimage with the senior group is really worth it.

t_ch: 我家老伴还反复叮嘱我，要多带点纪念品回去呢。
t_en: My husband repeatedly asked me to bring back more souvenirs.

t_ch: 您这话可就说对了！别急，我们专门安排了后续的购物环节，等看完这里就过去……
t_en: You said it right! Don't worry, we have a special shopping session planned afterward. We'll go after we wrap up here...

t_ch: 你听到了清亮的弹唱声——
t_en: You hear a resonating string instrument performance—

t_ch: 时光的流水，温雅却难再演。黎明初照绿叶，终将与岁月共眠。
t_en: The river of time flows soft and slow, yet once it's passed, it cannot glow. As dawn's first light on green leaves falls, they'll rest with time, as each one calls.

t_ch: 啊，伟大的化身，掌管命运的泰坦。请聆听人子的颂歌，将深邃带去长夜！
t_en: Ah, the great incarnation, Titans of Fate. Please listen to the song of the children of humanity, and bring depth to the long night!

t_ch: 噢噢…唱得真好…但和我年轻时还有差距，要想让人如沐神恩，就得像我这样，练习从腹部发声……
t_en: Oh... beautifully sung... but still a bit off from when I was young. To make people feel the divine grace, you have to practice singing from your abdomen, like I do...

t_ch: 大哥哥唱的…真的是命运吗？听上去好悲伤啊……
t_en: Is he really... singing about destiny? It sounds so sad...

t_ch: 我决定了。我将放弃成为辅祭的机会，离开这里，前往刻法勒的城邦——奥赫玛。
t_en: I've decided. I'll give up the chance to become an acolyte, leave here, and go to Kephale's city-state — Okhema.

t_ch: 等等，这是你求得的神谕吗？
t_en: Wait, is this the prophecy you asked for?

t_ch: 不。我按神谕和祭司的意志度过了许多年，但往后的路，我想自己决定。
t_en: No. I've followed the will of the prophecy and the priests for many years, but for the future, I want to make my own decisions.

t_ch: 人不该被预言束缚。这才是雅努斯…还有命运泰坦们的真实想法吧。
t_en: No one should be bound by prophecies. This is also what Janus... and the Fate Titans truly believe.

t_ch: 大哥，是你说这份工作能见到圣女大人，可这都过了多少个月，我连影子都没见着呢。
t_en: Well, you promised me that this job would let me meet the Holy Maiden, but it's been months, and I haven't seen even a glimpse of her.

t_ch: 别急，好好干，梦想总有天能实现的。我跟你说，圣女大人那飘逸的黑发，就如同最神秘的暗夜般深沉……
t_en: Patience. Just keep working hard — dreams do come true in time. You know, Holy Maiden's flowing black hair is as deep and mysterious as the darkest night...

t_ch: 啊，我好像看到了…是啊，优雅的身姿，柔美的乌黑秀发，那就是我们崇敬的圣女大人啊！
t_en: Ah, I think I see it now... Yes, that graceful figure, her soft, midnight-black hair — this must be our revered Holy Maiden!

t_ch: 「无论公民大会得出何种结论，都是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神谕许诺的结果」，结果元老院却不愿承认公民大会得出的结果。
t_en: "No matter what comes of the citizens' assembly, it stands as the promised result given unto us by {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}." In the end, the Council of Elders was unwilling to admit the results produced from the citizens' assembly.

t_ch: 元老院？那些家伙压根就没把神谕当回事！
t_en: The Council of Elders? These people have never taken the prophecy seriously!

t_ch: 别激动，年轻人。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}神谕…嗯，如果元老院也同意的话，那这就是它许诺的结果。可你们看，如今元老院不同意……
t_en: Relax, youngster. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale's{RUBY_E#} prophecy... Hm. If the Council of Elders agrees, then that is Kephale's promised outcome. But as you can see, if the Council does not agree...

t_ch: 呸，伟大的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}还得听元老院的意见了？我算是看明白了，你和你儿子都在为元老们工作，所以你才会满嘴胡言。
t_en: Tsk. The mighty {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} needs to heed the opinion of the Council of Elders? I see clearly now. You and your boy are working for the elders. That's why you're so full of lies.

t_ch: 你们这是…对元老院不敬。啊…不对，你们是在对泰坦不敬啊……
t_en: You're... disrespecting the Council of Elders. Ah... No! Your disrespect is toward the Titans themselves...

t_ch: 悄悄告诉你们，我真的听见刻法勒的声音了。
t_en: To tell you a secret, I truly heard Kephale's voice.

t_ch: 我怎么没听见，你不会又想骗人吧？{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}对你说了什么？
t_en: Then why couldn't I hear anything. You're not lying again, are you? What did {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} say to you?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}说让我在黎明机器熄灭之后去找它私聊。所谓天机不可泄露……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} asked that I speak with them privately after the Dawn Device goes out. Such divine secrets cannot be revealed...

t_ch: 你可闭嘴吧，众所周知，黎明机器将永远照亮奥赫玛！
t_en: Oh, do shut up. As far as we all know, the Dawn Device will forever illuminate Okhema!

t_ch: 是真的！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}说有些见不得光的话，不能放在明面上说。
t_en: It's true! {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} says there are some things that cannot be brought to the light, and that some things cannot be said in the open.

t_ch: 我真怀疑你是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒，说话不过脑子。我要是信你，我就是那个…那个飞天坛递。
t_en: I'm now starting to suspect if you're a follower of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}. Empty vessels make the most noise. If I believed you... then I might as well be a Flying Amphora.

t_ch: 就是猪的意思！
t_en: Basically, a FLYING PIG!

t_ch: 你也闭嘴！
t_en: You shut your trap too!

t_ch: 你听说过「大法吉娜节」吗？
t_en: Have you heard about the Festival of Phagousa?

t_ch: 能仔细说说吗？
t_en: Can you tell me more about it?

t_ch: 奥赫玛的剧作家们会在这个节日上展示他们的新作品，而观众会评选最佳剧本和表演者。
t_en: The playwrights of Okhema will showcase their new works during this program, and the audience will decide the best script and performers.

t_ch: 原来如此，我在故乡的城邦曾是一名戏剧评论家，我对这「大法吉娜节」很感兴趣。
t_en: So that's how it is. I used to be a theater critic in my homeland, so I am rather interested in this "Festival of Phagousa."

t_ch: 我记得上次获奖的剧目里，王子杀死了自己的父亲，又娶了自己的母亲，当他知道一切真相时，陷入了深深的绝望和自责中。
t_en: I remember that, in the last award-winning play, a prince slew his own father and married his own mother. But when he uncovered the truth, he fell deep into despair and self-blame.

t_ch: 后来呢？
t_en: What happened next?

t_ch: 他们用一个机械装置将扮演{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}从天而降，公平公正地用法律的手段拯救了王子，皆大欢喜！
t_en: They used a mechanical device to showcase {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton's{RUBY_E#} descent from the sky, using justice and fairness to save the prince and deliver a happy ending!

t_ch: 这不就是「机械降神」吗？我对奥赫玛的观众水平表示怀疑。
t_en: Wait, isn't this a literal "deus ex machina"? This makes me skeptical about the tastes of Okhemans.

t_ch: 请你完成这一世的试炼，赐我以「死亡」的拥抱，点燃「生命」的火苗。
t_en: Complete your trial in this life. Grant me the embrace of "Death" and light the spark of "Life" ablaze.

t_ch: 如果是你，在经历过生与死的锤炼之后，一定能为这片荒原带来第一抹生机……
t_en: You've been tempered by life and death. I know you'll be able to give this wasteland its first breath of life...

t_ch: 就像奔赴冥界的蝴蝶，落在死亡的枝头。
t_en: Like a raven butterfly flying swiftly into the nether realm, perching on the twig of death.

t_ch: …我会的。在那之后，我会永居冥界，让冥河回到这里，化作天上的细雨，将灵魂播撒向这片冥土……
t_en: ...I will. After this, I will remain permanently in the nether realm. The River of Souls shall return here and rain down from the sky, scattering souls across the earth...

t_ch: 生死将再度流转。你亲手播下的这片花海，今后将承载无数或悲或喜的灵魂，永远焕发生机。
t_en: The cycle of life and death will flow once again. This sea of flowers you sowed shall bear countless joyous or sorrowful souls, and bloom evermore.

t_ch: …谢谢你。
t_en: ...Thank you.

t_ch: 最后的最后，能请你…为我实现一个心愿么？
t_en: Just one last thing. Can you... grant me one wish?

t_ch: 当然可以。是什么？
t_en: Of course. What is it?

t_ch: 请…不要忘记我。
t_en: Please... don't forget me.

t_ch: …我答应你。
t_en: ...I promise you.

t_ch: 即便我将再度跨越轮回…当我们在来世再见时，我也一定会像最初诞生时那样……
t_en: When we meet in the next world... Even if I have endured another reincarnation...

t_ch: 即便，我们尚不知道对方的名字……
t_en: ...Even if we do not know each other's names...

t_ch: …我也一定会紧紧地、紧紧地抱住你。
t_en: ...I will still hold you tightly in my arms, just like what I did when we were born.

t_ch: 遐蝶…遐蝶……
t_en: Castorice... Castorice...

t_ch: 人如其名…多美呀。
t_en: You're as beautiful... as a fleeting butterfly.

t_ch: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…人又娇气，脾气又大，可真难伺候！
t_en: Taking care of a grandson is more troublesome than a son... He's sensitive, has a bad temper, and he's so difficult to deal with!

t_ch: 嗐，这也就是你家那个儿子出息…瞧瞧我家那几个，找不到工作不说，花钱还大手大脚！唉……
t_en: Ack, that's only possible with a good son like yours... Just look at our lot. None of them can find a job, but they spend money like it's going out of fashion! *sigh*...

t_ch: 这位大姐，年轻人如果为了我们这些老家伙省吃俭用，那不是反而亏待他们了？
t_en: Excuse me, madam. If the youngsters are being frugal for the sake of us old folks, aren't we being unfair to them?

t_ch: …你是谁？你难道很懂我家里的事？
t_en: ...Who are you? Do you even know my family?

t_ch: 哈哈，我只是路过而已，怎么可能懂呢…不过没关系。来，发个红包给你，开心开心。老先生也有份哦~
t_en: Haha, I'm just passing by, how could I know... But no matter. Here, madam, have this. Just a little something to cheer you up. And sir, here's some for you.

t_ch: 等等…啊？这么多钱？塔兰顿在上，可别是什么新型骗术……
t_en: Wait... Ah? This is quite some money. O Talanton above, this better not be some new type of scam...

t_ch: 我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
t_en: I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?

t_ch: 大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
t_en: Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.

t_ch: 欸，哥们儿，不对吧？这茴香不是我俩前天一起进的货吗？大姐也是老主顾了，你不给她便宜便宜？
t_en: Eh, bro, this isn't right. Didn't we purchase this fennel together just two days back? This lady is a regular customer. Can't you give her a discount?

t_ch: …啊？你谁啊，我怎么不认——
t_en: ...Huh? Who are you? I don't know you...

t_ch: 大姐，我是实诚人，买东西童叟无欺！您看我这肥皂，用传说中的西尔菲翁和顶好的橄榄油手工做的，是黑潮前才有的货哩……
t_en: Madam, I'm a decent merchant who sells quality goods at honest prices! Check this soap. It's handmade with the legendary Silphion and top-notch olive oil. Usually you can only find such good stuff before the black tide...

t_ch: 唉呀，真是心疼啊…多好的东西，这就扔了。
t_en: Oh my, it pains my heart... So many wonderful things are just thrown away. Such a waste.

t_ch: 老奶奶，我能理解你的心情…不过世界运转的底层逻辑，有时候就是「浪费」。
t_en: I understand how you feel... However, the logic that the world operates on is sometimes just "letting things go to waste."
...Huh?

t_ch: 比如说家里有三个小朋友，每个人都想要获得一颗糖。为了不让这些孩子打起来，老奶奶你应该买几颗糖呢？只买三颗，真的够吗？
t_en: For example, if you have three children at home, and each of them wants a piece of candy. To keep them from fighting, how much candy should you buy for them? Will three pieces do the job?

t_ch: …唉呀，你这丫头说话还真有意思。按你的意思，孩子们吃不完的糖，也只能靠我们这些年纪大的努力吃完了吧？
t_en: ...Oh dear, you really have a way with words. But if I follow your advice, guess there will be plenty of leftovers, and the elders would have to finish them all.

t_ch: 老奶奶，糖吃太多了能有什么好处啊？还是得小心预防糖尿病嘛。
t_en: Come on now, nobody should eat that much candy. You don't want to undermine your health with sweets.

t_ch: 你就不能靠谱一回吗？
t_en: Can't I rely on you for once in your life?

t_ch: 下次一定！
t_en: Next time! Promise!

t_ch: 果然常识是有极限的！
t_en: So common sense has its limits, does it not?

t_ch: 那你泼我冷水干嘛？！
t_en: Why are you spoiling this for me!?

t_ch: 黄金裔…没那么特别。
t_en: Chrysos Heirs... not that special after all.

t_ch: 真的假的？
t_en: Are you for real?

t_ch: 我搞明白了。
t_en: I figured it out.

t_ch: 嘘，快讲讲…
t_en: Shh, tell us quick...

t_ch: 快成了，就快成了…
t_en: Nearly done, almost there...

t_ch: 要远离迷信…
t_en: Stay away from superstition...

t_ch: 太对了。
t_en: So true.

t_ch: 这…对吗？
t_en: Is that... right?

t_ch: 执照真难拿啊…
t_en: Getting a license is impossible...

t_ch: 确实……
t_en: True...

t_ch: 锻造有技巧…
t_en: There's a knack to forging...

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Yeah.

t_ch: 奇美拉奇美拉奇美拉…
t_en: Chimera chimera chimera...

t_ch: 你冷静，冷静点…
t_en: Calm down, just calm down a little...

t_ch: 生活的意义是？
t_en: What is the meaning of life?

t_ch: 无聊。
t_en: Boring.

t_ch: 不对，不对。
t_en: No, that's wrong.

t_ch: 到底是哪边？
t_en: Which one is it?

t_ch: 这喂养奇美拉啊…
t_en: About feeding chimeras...

t_ch: 确实…不过…
t_en: Indeed... However...

t_ch: 这浴池可真舒服啊……
t_en: This bath is so comfortable...

t_ch: 我已经泡腻了，换个吧。
t_en: I'm getting sick of it already. Let's switch it up.

t_ch: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…
t_en: Taking care of a grandson is way harder than just taking care of your own son...

t_ch: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽…
t_en: Taking care of a grandson is way harder than just taking care of your own son...

t_ch: 我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
t_en: I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?

t_ch: 大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
t_en: Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.

t_ch: 唉呀，真是心疼啊…
t_en: Oh, I'm so devastated...

t_ch: 没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
t_en: Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...

t_ch: 我还是喜欢冷水浴。
t_en: I still prefer cold baths.

t_ch: 真是搞不懂你们年轻人…
t_en: I simply cannot understand you youngsters at all...

t_ch: 看来情况不怎么乐观…
t_en: Things aren't looking particularly optimistic at all...

t_ch: 但愿刻法勒保佑我们。
t_en: May Kephale protect us.

t_ch: 现在的袍子真不行。
t_en: Those modern robes won't do at all.

t_ch: 主要是版型问题。
t_en: It's mainly a style issue.

t_ch: 都是阿格莱雅玩剩下的。
t_en: Aglaea went through all these styles ages before.

t_ch: 你有偷偷喝两口吗？
t_en: Did you sneak a sip?

t_ch: …这不太好吧…
t_en: ...That doesn't sound like a good idea...

t_ch: 你这么做很不尊重法吉娜！
t_en: That's disrespectful to Phagousa!

t_ch: 可大人们不是这么说的……
t_en: But that's not what the grown-ups say...

t_ch: 不是，那帮人…
t_en: No, those people...

t_ch: 年轻人，想要占卜吗？
t_en: Youngster, would you like to know your fortune?

t_ch: 瑟希斯在上…
t_en: By Cerces above...

t_ch: 大家怎么就不明白呢？
t_en: Why doesn't anyone get it?

t_ch: 就不能通融一下吗…
t_en: Can't you bend the rules just this once...

t_ch: 抱歉，预约已经满了。
t_en: Sorry, our reservations are full.

t_ch: 散步有助于思考…
t_en: Walking is good for thinking...

t_ch: 别拦我，我一定行的！
t_en: Don't try and stop me. I can do this!

t_ch: 孩子，你听我说……
t_en: Listen to me, kid...

t_ch: 老师，您说…
t_en: Professor, you're saying...

t_ch: 是的，你很聪慧…
t_en: Yes, indeed, you're really clever...

t_ch: 我会保护大家的！
t_en: I will protect all of you!

t_ch: 我相信，你能做到。
t_en: I believe in you. You can do it.

t_ch: 只要你希望，我愿……
t_en: So long as you are willing, I shall...

t_ch: 快点，队伍很长。
t_en: Hurry up, the line is long.

t_ch: 说到吃的，最重要的肯定是外观。
t_en: When it comes to food, appearance is definitely what's most important.

t_ch: 说到吃的，最重要的肯定是外观。
t_en: When it comes to food, appearance is definitely what's most important.

t_ch: 塞纳托斯，您会记得…
t_en: Thanatos, you'll remember...

t_ch: 至终，重新流淌…
t_en: In the end, flowing once more...

t_ch: 阿米库斯，别再乱摸了！
t_en: Amycus, stop touching!

t_ch: 别招惹大地兽。
t_en: Don't aggravate the dromases.

t_ch: 哈哈，我又赢啦！
t_en: Haha, I win again!

t_ch: 出千了吧你？！
t_en: Did you just cheat!?

t_ch: 有点可惜啊。
t_en: Rather a pity.

t_ch: 知足吧。
t_en: Be happy with what you've got.

t_ch: 嗷嗷呜！
t_en: Awooooo!

t_ch: …嗷呜？
t_en: ...Awoo?

t_ch: 嗷！嗷呜！
t_en: Aw! Awoo!

t_ch: 嗷呜…嗷呜呜……
t_en: Awoo... Awoowoo...

t_ch: 嗷呜呜。
t_en: Awoowoo.

t_ch: 嗷呜~嗷呜~嗷嗷呜~
t_en: Awoo! Awoo! Awoooo!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜…嗷——
t_en: Awoo awoo... awoo...

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷，嗷呜嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo aw, awoo awoo!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜嗷！
t_en: Awoo awoo aw!

t_ch: 嗷呜，嗷呜嗷呜——
t_en: Awoo, Awoo woo...

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜~嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo awoo, awoooo!

t_ch: 嗷呜呜…嗷呜嗷呜？
t_en: Awoowoo... Awoo awoo?

t_ch: 嗷呜呜嗷呜！
t_en: Awoowoo awoo!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜，嗷呜！
t_en: Awoo awoo, awoo!

t_ch: 新朋友！
t_en: New friend!

t_ch: …是来玩的吗？
t_en: ...Here to play?

t_ch: 吃饱了！开心！
t_en: I'm full! Happy!

t_ch: 好累…做不动了……
t_en: So tired... Can't do anymore...

t_ch: 这才多少啊。
t_en: It wasn't even that much.

t_ch: 工作~工作~我爱工作~
t_en: Work, work, I love work!

t_ch: 睡个懒觉。哈——
t_en: Time for a nap. *yawn*

t_ch: 你的尾巴，形状好奇怪哦。
t_en: Your tail's shape is so weird.

t_ch: 你不是也有吗！
t_en: Yours too!

t_ch: 如果我有翅膀的话——
t_en: If I had wings...

t_ch: 想泡澡~想去市集里玩！
t_en: I want a bath, I want to visit the market!

t_ch: 休假时候，该做什么呢？
t_en: What should I do during my break?

t_ch: 园丁都好温柔哦。
t_en: The Gardeners are all so kind.

t_ch: 我们要好好表现才行！
t_en: We'd better do a good job!

t_ch: 来吧，我愿意向年轻人分享我的智慧和狡猾。
t_en: Come. I am willing to share my wisdom and cunning with the youth.

t_ch: 你靠近这散发无上威光的宝座，毫无疑问，它是纯金的。
t_en: You draw near the throne that is radiating an aura of supreme power. It's unquestionably made of solid gold.

t_ch: 构成它的每一颗原子曾来自中子星的碰撞、超新星的爆发…但假面愚者却将星星们珍贵的泪水锻造成了承接人类烦恼的器皿。也许在他们眼中，这样便幽了宇宙一默。
t_en: Every one of its atoms was born from colliding neutron stars and exploding supernovas... Yet the Masked Fools have forged these precious tears of the stars into a receptacle for humanity's woes. Perhaps, in their eyes, this is their way of telling the universe a joke.

t_ch: 一个疑问在你心中升起：都说皇帝爱用金锄头，那如此巨大的金马桶，坐上去又会有多舒服呢？
t_en: A question pops into your head: They say that emperors favor golden plows, so just how comfortable would it be to sit on such a colossal golden toilet?

t_ch: 坐上去试试…
t_en: Maybe I should try sitting on it...

t_ch: 坐上去试试！
t_en: Let's try sitting on it!

t_ch: 你爬上了这黄金王座的顶端，享受着睥睨众生的快感。无论人还是马桶，在你眼中都变得无比渺小。你仿佛成为了神明。
t_en: You climb atop the golden throne, savoring the thrill of looking down upon the world. People, toilets... everything seems so small from up here. It's like you've become a god.

t_ch: 好，体验完毕，是时候下去了…吗？
t_en: Alright, that was fun. Time to get off... or is it?

t_ch: 不，还不是时候！你感到一股莫大的责任感在阻止你离开：倘若你从这马桶上站起，便不再有人能镇压其中澎湃的不祥之力！
t_en: No, not yet! A profound sense of duty keeps you from leaving. If you were to rise from this toilet, who would be left to contain the surging, evil power within?

t_ch: …不对，确实有一股货真价实的吸力从你背后传来——源自马桶的涡心。
t_en: Wait, that's not it. There's a very real pulling force coming from behind you, originating from the toilet's swirling vortex.

t_ch: 啊哦……
t_en: Uh-oh...

t_ch: 一阵天旋地转过后……
t_en: After a moment of dizzying vertigo...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，睁开眼睛，我是马桶帝皇。
t_en: Open your eyes, {NICKNAME}. I am the Toilet Emperor.

t_ch: 遵从召唤而来了吗，汝这人类。
t_en: So, you have heeded my summons, human.

t_ch: 给我干哪来了，这还是酒馆吗？
t_en: Where the heck have you taken me? This isn't the tavern, is it?

t_ch: 马桶居然会说话？
t_en: Did that toilet just talk?

t_ch: 这剧情已经见过一遍了吧…
t_en: This plot feels... familiar.

t_ch: 汝现在身处一个以马桶为尊的世界。作为人类，汝唯一的价值就是坐马桶——这也是吾召唤汝的原因。
t_en: You now stand in a world where toilets reign supreme. As a human, your sole purpose is to sit upon them. That is why I have summoned you.

t_ch: 吾有四个孩子，每个都是帝国之支柱，马桶之坚盾。吾称它们为「桶长」，意为所有马桶的标杆。
t_en: I have four children. Each is a pillar of the imperium and a sturdy shield for toilets alike. I call them the "Grand Commodes," for they are paragons among all toilets.

t_ch: 它们各领职责、镇守帝国一方，保护马桶免受邪祟侵扰。只要吾之家庭其乐融融，帝国就能万世无忧。
t_en: Each has their own duty, guarding a corner of the imperium and protecting their fellow toilets from vile evils. As long as my family is in harmony, the imperium shall know eternal peace.

t_ch: 但由于吾不懂人心，这四个孩子都逐渐与吾疏远了。现在看来，恐怕已有叛乱的征兆……
t_en: But I do not understand the ways of the heart, and so, my four children have grown distant. Now, I fear there are signs of rebellion brewing...

t_ch: 汝的任务，就是把吾之<color=#dbc291ff>温暖</color>带给这四个孩子，告诉它们，吾还爱着它们。
t_en: Your mission is to bring my <color=#dbc291ff>warmth</color> to these four children. Let them know that I still love them.

t_ch: 为什么你不亲自去？
t_en: Why not do it yourself?

t_ch: 吾之身下镇压着不祥之物。为了整个马桶帝国的存续，吾不能移动半步。
t_en: I am suppressing a great evil beneath my seat. For the continued existence of the Toilet Imperium, I cannot move even an inch.

t_ch: 我没有别的选择吗？
t_en: Is there no other option?

t_ch: 吾有一个可以彻底拯救马桶帝国的计划。若要完成它，网道之桶必不可少——就是那个四处逃窜的纯白马桶。
t_en: I have a plan to save the Toilet Imperium for good. To see it through, the Toilet of Webways is essential, which is the pure white toilet that's always on the run.

t_ch: 如果汝能抓到它，吾会无条件送汝回去。毕竟到了那时，吾与儿子们就都没用了。
t_en: Should you manage to capture it, I shall send you back unconditionally. After all, by then, my sons and I will have served our purpose.

t_ch: 懂了，你要让我去坐它们。
t_en: So, you want me to sit on them. Got it.

t_ch: 没错，只要坐上马桶，便可以温暖它们的内心、使它们娇羞…咳，我是说团结和睦。
t_en: Correct. By sitting upon them, you shall warm their hearts and make them blush... Ahem, I mean, unite them in harmony.

t_ch: 帝国究竟是否会走向分裂，全系于汝之行动。等到危机圆满解决后，吾便会将汝送回来处。
t_en: Whether the imperium falls into disunity rests entirely on your actions. Once the crisis is resolved, I shall send you back whence you came.

t_ch: 汝需先去造访吾的三个小儿子，它们分别是秘密之桶、操盘之桶和崇拜之桶。在吾之大计划完成前，它们对帝国至关重要。
t_en: First, you must visit my three younger sons: the Toilet of Secrets, the Toilet of Stratagems, and the Toilet of Zealots. They are vital to the imperium until my grand plan is complete.

t_ch: （被马桶统治的星球…考虑到这儿是愚者的地盘，好像也没啥不可能。眼下只能先听它的了。）
t_en: (A planet ruled by toilets... Well, this is the Fools' domain, so I guess anything is possible. I should probably just play along for now.)

t_ch: 在你靠近时，这排桶突然发出了连续的冲水声，仿佛高功率引擎的轰鸣，又仿佛数匹骏马的嘶吼。
t_en: As you get closer, the row of toilets suddenly flushes in unison. The sound is like the roar of a high-powered engine, or perhaps the thundering neighs of powerful steeds.

t_ch: 怎么还不开口？真是嘴硬的人类。
t_en: Still not talking? What a tough human.

t_ch: …首先，我是欧克，不是人类。其次，你也没问啊！
t_en: First of all, I'm an orch, not a human. And second of all, you didn't even ask!

t_ch: 哦，怪我，光顾着摆弄最新的「秘密妙妙工具」，差点忘了正事。
t_en: Oops, my bad. I was just fiddling with my latest "Wonder Gadget of Secrets" and almost forgot what I was doing.

t_ch: 说，你在马桶帝国的任务是什么！
t_en: Now talk! What is your mission in the Toilet Imperium!?

t_ch: 你就是黄金马桶的儿子？
t_en: You're the Golden Toilet's son?

t_ch: 不要用问题回答问题！…等等，又一个人类？桶圈骑士们，快绑了{F#她}{M#他}！
t_en: Do not answer my question with another question! Wait, another human? Knights of the Toilet Seat, seize {F#her}{M#him}!

t_ch: 回过神来时，你已经被绑在了联排桶的正中央。整个过程快到连动态视力都无法看清，甚至没有给你反抗的选项。
t_en: The next thing you know, you're tied to the very center of the toilet row. The whole thing happened too fast for the eye to see, leaving you no chance to even resist.

t_ch: 桀桀桀…就让我亲自招待你吧。你应该感到荣幸，然后忏悔对马桶所犯的罪。
t_en: Hehe... Allow me to entertain you myself. You should feel honored. Now, confess for the sins you have committed against all toilets.

t_ch: 现在你知道我为什么在这里了。
t_en: Now you see what I've been dealing with.

t_ch: 感受到耳边呼啸的风声了吗？忏悔吧！然后哭着把秘密都交代出来吧！
t_en: Feel that wind whistling in your ears? Confess! And then cry your little heart out and tell me all your secrets!

t_ch: 唔啊啊啊啊啊！
t_en: Arrrggghhh!

t_ch: 承受了如此恐怖的加速度，居然一点反应都没有…我说，你该不会是帝皇老头子派来的吧？
t_en: To withstand such terrifying G-forces without even flinching... Tell me, that old geezer emperor didn't send you, did he?

t_ch: 原本我想说来着…
t_en: I was trying to tell you...

t_ch: 你应该知道我为何而来。
t_en: You should know why I'm here.

t_ch: （老头从哪找来了如此恐怖的人类？要是我的小秘密被发现，那可就完了。）
t_en: (Where did the old man find such a fearsome human? If my little secret gets discovered, it's all over for me.)

t_ch: （而且不知为何，我的内心居然对这股温暖…生出了一丝眷恋？不行，不能这样下去了。）
t_en: (And for some reason, I'm actually growing... attached to this warmth? No, this can't be happening.)

t_ch: 咳咳…我对帝国的忠心无以复加。请帝皇放心。
t_en: Ahem... My loyalty to the imperium is absolute. Please tell His Majesty not to worry.

t_ch: 至于你，你已经证明了自己是个纯洁的人类。不管你过去对马桶犯下过何种罪孽，都已经得到了赦免。
t_en: As for you, you've proven that you are a human of pure heart. Whatever sins you have committed against toilets, they are hereby pardoned.

t_ch: （为什么我能听见马桶的心声？不管了，至少任务完成了……）
t_en: (Why am I able to hear a toilet's inner thoughts? Oh well, at least the mission's complete...)

t_ch: 赞美操盘之桶，我们的牧人。
t_en: Praise be to the Toilet of Stratagems, our shepherd!

t_ch: 没错，我就是全帝国最会运营的桶。学会哥的运营，剩下的就只有享福了。
t_en: That's right. I'm the greatest operator in the imperium. Learn my system, and you'll have it made.

t_ch: 你就是黄金马桶的儿子？
t_en: You're the Golden Toilet's son?

t_ch: 看啊，一个人类，一个陌生的面孔……
t_en: Well, look what we have here. A human, and a new face...

t_ch: 不要小瞧我的情报网，你就是那个来自异世界的人类，我说的对不对？
t_en: Do not underestimate my information network. You're the human from another world, am I right?

t_ch: 每个马桶小时候都读过这样的厕纸故事：浑身金光的人类勇者会从管道中爬出，为马桶世界带来前所未有的变革……
t_en: Every young toilet grows up reading bathroom stories like this: A brave human, bathed in golden light, will emerge from the pipes to bring unprecedented change to the world of toilets...

t_ch: 不过现在，会为帝国带来变革的是我。在我的运营下，每个马桶都能有数不尽的空气清新剂，和用不完的厕纸——标准化生产，小子。
t_en: But now, I'm the one who's going to change this imperium. Under my operation, every toilet will have countless air fresheners and an endless supply of toilet paper. It's all about standardized production, kid.

t_ch: 看看这些整齐的坑位吧，终有一日，我要把它扩充到<unbreak>500</unbreak>个。到时候就叫：第二马桶帝国！
t_en: Look at these orderly stalls! One day, I'll expand them to <unbreak>500</unbreak>. Then it shall be known as the Second Toilet Imperium!

t_ch: 所以，为我所用吧，人类。无论帝皇许诺你多少好处，我都出双倍！
t_en: So come and work for me, human. Whatever the Emperor offered you, I'll double it!

t_ch: 如果我说不呢？
t_en: And if I say no?

t_ch: 那我只能表示可惜，我原本不打算对付你的……
t_en: Well, that's a shame. I really was hoping we wouldn't have to do this...

t_ch: 那么，代价是什么？
t_en: And what's the price?

t_ch: 哦，代价…当然，完美的帝国总是建立在牺牲之上。
t_en: Oh, the price... Yes, of course. A perfect imperium is always built on sacrifices.

t_ch: 看吧，那些不愿享福、试图破坏秩序的人类就会落得这种下场——在牢房里度过一生。
t_en: You see, this is what happens to humans who refuse to enjoy the good life and try to disrupt the system. They spend the rest of their days in a prison cell.

t_ch: 如果你不能为我所用，我就要亲自殴打你，把你投入大牢！
t_en: If you won't work for me, I'll have to beat you up myself and toss you in jail!

t_ch: 总督大人…您忘了您上次跟人单挑，结果连马桶盖都差点被人家打掉的事了吗？
t_en: Sir... the last time you challenged someone to a one-on-one fight, you nearly had your lid knocked clean off, remember?

t_ch: 没关系，我最大的优点就是想得开、顶得住。面对此等强敌，我不上谁上？
t_en: It's fine. My greatest assets are my thick skin and my open mind. If I don't step up to face this foe, who will?

t_ch: 既然如此，我接受。
t_en: Very well, I accept your offer.

t_ch: 你…什么，你真的愿意成为我的部下？从没想过会这么简单！
t_en: You... What? You're actually willing to work for me? I never thought it'd be this easy!

t_ch: 咳咳…那么，你的第一个任务就是，向各大马桶宣告你的臣服——坐上我吧。
t_en: Ahem... Well then, your first task is to declare your submission to all the great toilets... by sitting on me.

t_ch: 我一定要完成帝皇的任务！
t_en: I have to finish the Emperor's mission!

t_ch: 呵，多说无益，放马过来吧！
t_en: Hmph, enough talk. Bring it on!

t_ch: …哦哦哦哦哦哦！这，这是什么感觉？
t_en: Whoaaa! Wh—What is this warmth?

t_ch: 这份温暖，让我想起了已逝的母亲，还有那个曾经美好的家庭……
t_en: It... reminds me of my late mother, and the wonderful family we once had...

t_ch: 拿走我所有的厕纸和桶圈吧！我愿意献出财富、放弃梦想，只希望能多体验一会儿……
t_en: Take all my toilet paper and all my toilet seats! I'd give up my fortune and abandon my dreams, if only I could savor this for just a moment longer...

t_ch: 不等它感慨完，你便嫌弃地离去了。
t_en: Before it could finish its sentimental speech, you get up and walk away in disgust.

t_ch: 你有近距离观察过黄金马桶吗？它拯救的生命数量超出你想象！
t_en: Have you ever observed the Golden Toilet up close? It's saved more lives than you could possibly imagine!

t_ch: 你…是黄金马桶的儿子？
t_en: Are you... the son of the Golden Toilet?

t_ch: 没错，我虽然不是马桶，但比任何一座马桶都更爱马桶！
t_en: That's right! I may not be a toilet myself, but I love toilets more than any toilet ever could!

t_ch: 想当年，我还是路边一个平平无奇的桶…如今我已是那位圣皇的儿子，兼最虔诚的崇拜者。
t_en: Back in the day, I was just a plain old trashcan on the side of the road... Now, I am a son to the Holy Emperor, and his most devoted follower.

t_ch: 圣皇的光芒宛如神明，但它从不承认自己的神圣，而是放任那些无礼之徒诋毁自己、玷污自己。我不允许这种事继续下去！
t_en: The Holy Emperor's brilliance is divine, yet he never acknowledges his own sanctity. Instead, he allows the disrespectful to slander and sully him. I will not allow this to continue!

t_ch: 我花掉了整整三卷厕纸，为圣皇写就《神圣箴言录》，而圣皇把它们尽数冲进了下水道——肯定是对我的认可！
t_en: I spent three entire rolls of toilet paper writing the Sacred Admonishments for the Holy Emperor, and he flushed every last one of them down the sewer. Surely, it was a sign of his approval!

t_ch: 下面请听我诵读《神圣箴言录》第一章，我与马桶维修艺术……
t_en: Now, allow me to recite the first chapter of the Sacred Admonishments: Me and the Art of Toilet Maintenance...

t_ch: 住口，先别念！
t_en: Stop right there!

t_ch: 垃圾桶该怎么坐…
t_en: How am I supposed to sit on a trashcan...?

t_ch: 我一直是圣皇虔诚的追随者，从无反叛之意。见到你，我便已明白，圣皇要对我降下温暖…啊，它果然是一位温柔的神明。我从一开始就是对的~
t_en: I have always been the Holy Emperor's most faithful follower, without a single traitorous thought. Upon seeing you, I knew at once that the Holy Emperor meant to grace me with his warmth... Ah, he truly is a benevolent god. I knew I was right all along~

t_ch: （这人…不，这个桶没救了，下一个吧。）
t_en: (This guy... no, this one is a lost cause. Time for the next one.)

t_ch: 你似乎忠心耿耿。
t_en: You seem quite loyal.

t_ch: …汝竟然这么快就做到了。或许，汝比吾更适合统御诸位桶长。
t_en: Oh, you've accomplished it so quickly! Perhaps you are better suited to rule the Grand Commodes than I am.

t_ch: 但在桶长中，最重要的当属吾之大儿，吾最偏爱的孩子——将帅之桶。它正在吾身后的边疆远征。
t_en: But among the Grand Commodes, the most important of all is my firstborn, my favorite child — Toilet of Dominion. He is currently on an expedition to the frontiers behind me.

t_ch: 当心，那里有擅长玩弄人心的邪恶四桶。稍有不慎，汝就会落入它们的圈套。吾那大儿恐怕也已经……
t_en: Be careful. The four wicked toilets there are masters of manipulation. One wrong move, and you'll fall into their trap. I fear my eldest son may have already...

t_ch: 倘若它当真已被蛊惑，到时候就由汝自行决断吧。
t_en: If he has truly been bewitched, I will leave his fate in your hands.

t_ch: 人生万物以养桶，桶无一物以报人。怎么办？只有战！
t_en: Humans provide all things to nourish toilets, yet toilets give nothing in return. What is to be done? There is only... war!

t_ch: 呵呵…绿色代表健康，绿色的马桶才没有烦恼。所以，都来把这玩意染成绿的吧！
t_en: Hehe... Green is the color of health. A green toilet is a happy toilet. So, let's paint this thing green!

t_ch: 这也是计划的一部分，这也是计划的一部分…这也是计划的一部分！
t_en: It's all part of the plan, it's all part of the plan... It's all part of the plan!

t_ch: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你最渴望的东西是什么？无尽的卷纸？美丽的马桶圈？无论什么我都能满足，只要你和我签订契约成为魔法少女……
t_en: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, what is it your heart desires? An endless supply of toilet paper? A beautiful toilet seat? I can grant your every wish, if you'll just sign a contract with me and become a magical girl...

t_ch: 摔杯为号…不，还是振臂一呼来得直接。
t_en: The signal will be a shattered cup... No, a call to arms is more direct.

t_ch: 我为你带来了父亲的爱。
t_en: I have brought you your father's love.

t_ch: 呵呵，爱…事到如今，那个暴君还有什么脸面谈爱？它只是把我们当成工具，就像…就像一个只为了上厕所才坐马桶的人类！
t_en: Hehe, love... How dare that tyrant speak of love? He treats us like tools... just like a human who only sits on a toilet when they need to use it!

t_ch: 看见那四个坑位里的桶了吗？它们每个都身怀绝技、才华横溢，说话又好听，简直比亲爹还要爱我！
t_en: See those four toilets in the stalls? Each one is talented, brilliant, and knows just what to say. They love me more than my own father ever did!

t_ch: 每天和它们待在一起，我感受到了家的温暖——那个无情的刽子手能给我这种温暖吗？！
t_en: I feel the warmth of a family with them every day. Can that heartless monster give me that kind of warmth!?

t_ch: 更何况我已经看清了，马桶们的福祉建立在对人类的压榨之上。整个帝国就是一场彻头彻尾的谎言，唯有一场华丽的叛乱才能涤荡这一切污秽。
t_en: Besides, I see the truth now. The welfare of all toilets is built upon the exploitation of humans. This entire imperium is a complete lie. Only a glorious rebellion can wash away all this filth.

t_ch: 如果我不能从暴君手中拯救这个国度，那就让厕所燃烧吧！
t_en: If I cannot save this nation from the hands of a tyrant, then let the bathrooms burn!

t_ch: 我先去会会那四个桶！
t_en: I'll go take care of those four toilets first!

t_ch: 对父亲发起华丽的叛逆吧！
t_en: Let's start a glorious rebellion against your father!

t_ch: 好，我这便杀入皇宫，夺它鸟位！
t_en: Good. I'll storm the palace and take his wretched throne!

t_ch: 不管怎样，叛逆都是不好的！
t_en: Rebellion is never the answer!

t_ch: 事到如今，言语已经无法挽回。想要让浪子回头，只剩下一条路了……
t_en: Words are useless now. There's only one way to bring a prodigal son home...

t_ch: 如果我不能从暴君手中拯救这个国度，那就让厕所燃烧吧！
t_en: If I cannot save this nation from the hands of a tyrant, then let the bathrooms burn!

t_ch: 我先去会会那四个桶！
t_en: I'll go take care of those four toilets first!

t_ch: 对父亲发起华丽的叛逆吧！
t_en: Let's start a glorious rebellion against your father!

t_ch: 好，我这便杀入皇宫，夺它鸟位！
t_en: Good. I'll storm the palace and take his wretched throne!

t_ch: 不管怎样，叛逆都是不好的！
t_en: Rebellion is never the answer!

t_ch: 事到如今，言语已经无法挽回。想要让浪子回头，只剩下一条路了……
t_en: Words are useless now. There's only one way to bring a prodigal son home...

t_ch: 哦？不但没有被感化，反倒带着这么多桶向吾走过来了吗？
t_en: Well, well. So you won't be swayed? And now you're marching on me with a whole army of toilets?

t_ch: 你的谎言到此为止了，暴君。今天，所有正直的马桶都将见识你的真面目，而所有受压迫的人类都将得到解放！
t_en: Your lies end here, tyrant! Today, all noble toilets will see you for what you are, and the humans will be liberated!

t_ch: 勇气可嘉。但你不明白，吾之身下镇压着大邪恶。如果吾被推翻，整个马桶帝国就会毁灭……
t_en: How brave. But you do not understand. There is a great evil suppressed beneath me. If I am toppled, the entire Toilet Imperium will be destroyed...

t_ch: 以人类与马桶的名义，受死吧，暴君！
t_en: In the name of humans and toilets... Die, tyrant!

t_ch: 巨大的轰鸣声传来，黄金马桶身后复杂的管道系统瞬间断裂，内容物如洪流般淹没了整个帝国……
t_en: A mighty crash resounds as the plumbing behind the Golden Toilet is blown apart. What lay within erupts in a torrent, submerging the whole imperium...

t_ch: 这场不可名状的灾难超出了一切认知，无人敢于详细描述。总而言之，随着黄金马桶倒下，马桶帝国也一并毁灭了。
t_en: It is a tragedy beyond description, a horror that no one dares to detail. To put it simply, when the Golden Toilet is deposed, the entire Toilet Imperium is flushed away with it.

t_ch: 这份温暖，如此真实…父亲，原来你一直都是爱着我的！我总算明白了你的良苦用心！
t_en: This warmth... it feels so real... Father, your love was always there for me! I finally understand the sacrifices you made!

t_ch: 曾经那个不懂事的我想过叛逆。但现在，我只想为你祝寿！
t_en: I was once a fool who dreamed of rebellion. But now, my only wish is to honor you, Father!

t_ch: 没关系，儿子。从今往后，我们再也不分开！
t_en: Don't worry, son. From now on, we'll never be apart!

s_ch: 勇气&慈爱&智慧&魅力之桶
s_en: Barrel of Courage & Love & Wisdom & Charm
t_ch: 可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
t_en: Sincere congratulations.

t_ch: 等一下，这四个为什么在这？
t_en: Hold up, why are these four here?

t_ch: 哦，它们说为父皇你准备了一份礼物，请看……
t_en: Oh, they said they prepared a gift for you, Your Majesty. Please look...

t_ch: 巨大的轰鸣声传来，黄金马桶身后复杂的管道系统瞬间断裂，内容物如洪流般淹没了整个帝国……
t_en: A mighty crash resounds as the plumbing behind the Golden Toilet is blown apart. What lay within erupts in a torrent, submerging the whole imperium...

t_ch: 这场不可名状的灾难超出了一切认知，无人敢于详细描述。总而言之，马桶帝国毁灭了。
t_en: This unspeakable catastrophe defied all comprehension, and no one dared to describe it in detail. Long story short, the Toilet Imperium was destroyed.

t_ch: …好重力的一对父子。算了，至少我能顺利回到原来的世界。
t_en: ...What a pair of father and son. Oh well, at least I can make it back to my original world safely.

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，你是否清醒？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, are you awake?

t_ch: 我回来了？
t_en: I'm... back?

t_ch: 我感觉良好。
t_en: I'm feeling good.

t_ch: 好癫的剧情发展…
t_en: What a wild and crazy plot...

t_ch: 听说你掉进了「黄金告解室」，我连忙叫上几个人去那宝座旁边蹲守。果然，不一会儿你就被冲了出来。
t_en: I heard you fell into the "Golden Confessional," so I gathered a few people to stake out near that throne. Sure enough, you came bursting out not long after.

t_ch: 看症状，你应该是摄入了太多劣质笑话，又或是被某个废弃剧本给缠住了。我调了三大杯笑点高的冰饮才帮你恢复清醒。
t_en: From the symptoms, you must've overdosed on bad jokes, or got tangled up in some abandoned script. It took three large glasses of high-quality comedy on ice to bring you back to your senses.

t_ch: 总之，下次小心点吧——酒馆里这么多笑话，万一哪个是真的呢？
t_en: Anyway, be more careful next time. With so many jokes floating around the tavern, who knows which one might turn out to be true?

t_ch: 今日海鲜已售罄…
t_en: Seafood's sold out for the day...

t_ch: 怎么每次来都卖完啊？
t_en: How come it's sold out every time I'm here?

t_ch: 就不能多进点食材吗？
t_en: Can't you stock a few more ingredients?

t_ch: 哟，瞧瞧谁来了，大名鼎鼎的球棒浣熊！你的光临真是令本店蓬荜生辉啊。
t_en: Well, well, look who it is! The one and only Baseball Raccoon! An honor to have you grace my humble establishment.

t_ch: 有什么想尝的，尽管提！无论是空中的猛禽，或是丛林深处的凶兽，我都能给你弄来。
t_en: Just say the word, and I'll get you whatever you want to taste! Whether it's a raptor from the sky or a beast from deep in the jungle, I can get it for you.

t_ch: 应有尽有。只有你想不到的，没有我找不出来的。
t_en: I've got it all. The only limit is your imagination, not my inventory.

t_ch: 不知为何，望着身前向你挤眉弄眼的大章鱼，困惑如同水泡般从你的心底陡然升了起来。
t_en: For some reason, as you watch the giant, winking octopus before you, a sense of confusion begin to bubble up from deep within you.

t_ch: 怎么，克拉肯的店不卖海鲜？
t_en: Wait, what? Kraken's shop doesn't sell seafood?

t_ch: 你这店面涉嫌虚假宣传了吧…
t_en: Isn't this, like, false advertising?

t_ch: 哈哈哈！我还以为是什么让贵客不满呢，原来是想吃海鲜。小事，小事啊！
t_en: Hahaha! And here I was wondering what was troubling our esteemed guest. Turns out you're just craving seafood. No biggie, no biggie at all!

t_ch: 我，克拉肯——叱咤星海的「寰宇海妖王」——去深海抓几条鱼，还不是轻而易举。
t_en: For me, Kraken, the fearsome "Cosmic Sea Monster King," catching a few fish from the deep sea is as easy as can be.

t_ch: 别急啊，我这就安排，味道保准让你满意！
t_en: Don't you worry! I'll get right on it, and I promise you'll love the taste!

t_ch: 但作为珍鲜食材的回报，可否请见多识广的球棒浣熊，帮我实现一个心愿？
t_en: But in return for these fine ingredients, could I ask the well-traveled Baseball Raccoon to help me with a little wish of my own?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>克拉肯，想回天外的大海看看。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I wish to see the great ocean beyond the sky once more.</color>

t_ch: 幻造种还能离开二相乐园的？
t_en: I thought imagenae couldn't leave Planarcadia?

t_ch: 哼，克拉肯也曾是在银河兴风作浪的大海妖，别把我跟那些小妖怪混为一谈。
t_en: Hmph! I was once a great sea monster who once wreaked havoc across the cosmos. Don't lump me in with those petty strangeling.

t_ch: 它们非得仰赖那轮幻月过活，而我，早凭自身实力突破了这重限制。
t_en: They need that Phantasmoon to exist, but I broke free of that limitation on my own long ago.

t_ch: …什么叫「回天外的大海」？
t_en: What do you mean by "the great ocean beyond the sky"?

t_ch: 哼，克拉肯也曾是在银河兴风作浪的大海妖，莫非以为我离不开这二相乐园？
t_en: Hmph! I was once a great sea monster who once wreaked havoc across the cosmos. Do you really think a place like Planarcadia could hold me?

t_ch: 那些小妖怪非得仰赖幻月过活，而我，早凭自身实力突破了这重限制。
t_en: Those petty strangeling need the Phantasmoon to exist, but I broke free of that limitation on my own long ago.

t_ch: 宇宙就是一片海洋，而我是它的国王。我激起的浪花，足以使边陲的万千星系覆灭。
t_en: The universe is an ocean, and I am its king. My slightest ripple can unmake galaxies on its farthest shores.

t_ch: 我的触须与爪牙遍布银河各处，只须一声令下，它们便将重新拥立我为这星海之王。
t_en: My tendrils of influence stretch to every corner of the stars. At my word, they shall rise to reclaim my throne.

t_ch: 停停停——
t_en: Okay, okay, that's enough!

t_ch: 堂堂海妖王，搁这卖鱼生？
t_en: The great Sea Monster King, reduced to selling raw fish slices here?

t_ch: 哈哈，这便是命运使然。{RUBY_B#深海恶魔}克拉肯{RUBY_E#}诞生自人们对大海的恐惧，岁月流转，时代变迁，当那些奇异的怪谈不再被传唱之时——
t_en: Haha, what an ironic twist of fate. I, {RUBY_B#Deep Sea Devil}Kraken{RUBY_E#}, came into being from mankind's fear of the ocean. But as ages passed and the world changed, those peculiar ghost stories faded from memory...

t_ch: 我能获取的愿力也逐渐减少，以至于现在不得不依靠开店，靠着人气来维生。
t_en: ...and so did the Wishpower I fed on, to the point where I must live off the foot traffic my little shop gets.

t_ch: 所以，带我回去看看吧。那些曾由我主宰的海洋，如今是什么模样？
t_en: So, please, take me back there. I wish to see what has become of the oceans I once ruled.

t_ch: 该怎么带你出去呢？
t_en: But how am I supposed to get you out of here?

t_ch: 无需烦恼，克拉肯自然有办法。
t_en: Don't you worry about that. I have my own methods.

t_ch: 拿去吧。我将毕生愿力都灌注进了这对眼眸之中，它将替代我，随你去那天外走一遭。
t_en: Here, take these. I've poured all the Wishpower I have into this pair of eyes. They'll take my place and travel with you beyond the sky.

t_ch: 别担心，要去的地方你都很熟悉——<color=#dbc291ff>匹诺康尼、贝洛伯格与仙舟的海域。</color>
t_en: Fear not, for the places you must visit are ones you know well: <color=#dbc291ff>the waters of Penacony, Belobog, and the Xianzhou.</color>

t_ch: 等周游归来，我请你吃最上乘的海鲜。
t_en: When you get back, I'll treat you to the best seafood you've ever had.

t_ch: 你还看得见我吗？
t_en: You can still see me, right?

t_ch: 当然。「寰宇海妖王」无须以目视物，克拉肯观看，靠的是心眼。
t_en: Of course. The Cosmic Sea Monster King has no need for physical sight. I see everything with my mind's eye.

t_ch: 每条触须，都是我与外物接触的某个侧面——我端坐在这里，根须却连着世界。
t_en: Every one of my tendrils is an extension of my being, a point of contact with the world beyond. I may sit here, but my roots are connected to all things.

t_ch: 快去吧。我灌注在眼眸中的愿力无法维持太久，别浪费了这仅有的机会。
t_en: Now, hurry. The Wishpower I've infused into these eyes will not last forever. Do not squander my rare opportunity.
*barfs*...

t_ch: 海妖王，怎么还晕船的？
t_en: The Sea Monster King gets seasick?

t_ch: 很久没出门是这样的。
t_en: That's what happens when you become a shut-in.

t_ch: 能不能…请你找个物件，把我的眼睛放上去，这样…会让我感觉好受些。
t_en: Could you... find something to put my eyes on? It'll... make me feel a lot better.

t_ch: 你的目光在房间里四处逡巡，最终落在了角落的某件物品上。
t_en: You look around the room, your gaze finally landing on something in the corner.

t_ch: 啊，现在好多了，感谢你出手相助。事不宜迟，我们这就开始游览吧。
t_en: Ah, much better. Thank you for your help. Now, without further ado, let us begin our tour.

t_ch: 这…和我预想的不太一样。
t_en: This... is not quite what I had in mind.

t_ch: 你望着那浅浅的浴缸，不由得长叹一口气。好吧，谁说匹诺康尼的入梦池不能算是海呢？
t_en: You gaze at the shallow bathtub and let out a long sigh. Oh well, who's to say Penacony's Dreampool doesn't count as an ocean?

t_ch: 我离开此处时，从未想到人类还能建起如此华丽而虚假的王国，宛如海中幻月。
t_en: When I last left this place, I never imagined that humans could build such a garish, illusory kingdom, like a reflection of the Phantasmoon upon the water.

t_ch: 所谓幻造种，与你说的「美梦剧团」怕是别无二致吧。
t_en: The imagenae are probably just like that "Sweet Dreams Troupe" you mentioned, aren't they?

t_ch: 你统治的海洋就这？
t_en: This is the ocean you ruled over?

t_ch: 所以，你的爪牙们呢？
t_en: And where, pray tell, are your minions?

t_ch: 咳。莫要怀疑，时间会令王权风化褪色，但它们的忠诚始终如一，等待我来唤醒。
t_en: Ahem... Have no doubt. Time may weather the crown, but their loyalty remains constant, just waiting for my awakening call.

t_ch: 小的们，你们的王回来了！
t_en: Hear ye, hear ye! Your king is back!

t_ch: 寂静无声。唯有温热的浴缸水还在咕噜咕噜地冒着泡。
t_en: The announcement was met with silence. Only the gurgling of the warm bathwater could be heard.

t_ch: 你被抛弃了。
t_en: It seems your subjects have left you behind.

t_ch: 新时代没有能载你的船！
t_en: This new age has sailed on without you!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈。怎、怎么会呢，莫慌，且让我提高声量，再试一遍。
t_en: Hahahaha... N—Nonsense! Perhaps they just didn't hear me. I'll try again, but louder.

t_ch: <size=28>小的们，你们的王回来了！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Hear ye, hear ye! Your king is back!</size>

t_ch: 咕噜咕噜——
t_en: *gurgle*...

t_ch: 这…克拉肯可没骗你，怕是这梦的国度太过混沌，它们在其中迷失了心智。
t_en: I... I'm telling the truth! This dream world must be so chaotic that they've all lost themselves within it.

t_ch: <size=36>小的们，你们的王回来了！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Hear ye, hear ye! Your king is back!</size>
*gurgle*... *gurgle*...

t_ch: 噢。你看，这不是来了吗？鱼虾们，龟蟹们，海妖王御驾亲征，还不速速出迎？！
t_en: Oh! You see? Here they come now! My fish and shrimp! My turtles and crabs! The Sea Monster King is here in person, so come and greet me!

t_ch: 古古古…顾客！你的信息不在酒店登记名单中，请随我们去猎犬家系接受调查！
t_en: S—Sir! Your name is not on the guest ledger. Please come with us to the Bloodhound Family for an investigation!

t_ch: 好盛大的欢迎仪式…
t_en: What a grand welcoming party...

t_ch: 「家族」邀请你去喝茶呢。
t_en: The Family would like a word with you.

t_ch: 此地凶险，我们还是离开为好。
t_en: This place is treacherous. It would be wise for us to depart.

t_ch: 没想到啊，我来此地寻宝的时候，见到的还是浩瀚汪洋，风浪大得仿佛要折断桅杆。
t_en: I can't believe it. The last time I was here looking for treasure, this was a vast ocean with waves big enough to break a mast.

t_ch: 现在…怎么就只剩个泉眼了呢？
t_en: Why... is there only a fountain left now?

t_ch: 你望着那小小的出水口，不由得长叹一口气。好吧，谁说贝洛伯格的喷泉不能算是海呢？
t_en: You gaze at the small fountainhead and let out a long sigh. Oh well, who's to say Belobog's fountain doesn't count as an ocean?

t_ch: 「想要我的财宝吗？去找吧！我把所有财宝都放在那里。」
t_en: "My treasure? If you want it, you can have it! Find it! I left everything the world has to offer there."

t_ch: 当年，我追逐前代海妖王的遗言来到这里，与四大鱼皇展开争夺，尾鳍击碎礁岩，落鳞填平深壑，接连鏖战了数十个琥珀纪。
t_en: In those days, I followed the last words of the former Sea Monster King to this very place. I battled against the four Fish Sovereigns for the treasure, with my tail shattering reefs and my scales filling the deepest trenches. Our fierce battle raged for dozens of Amber Eras.

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 「银河战力党」怎么没你？
t_en: How come you're not a part of the Cosmicon Collective?

t_ch: 哼，那是场没有胜者的战争。四大鱼皇悉数陨落，而我积攒的愿力也消耗殆尽，不得不返回二相乐园休养，这才有了如今的小酒馆。
t_en: Hmph. It was a war with no winner. The four Fish Sovereigns all perished, and the Wishpower I had amassed was spent. I had no choice but to return to Planarcadia to recover, which led to the tavern I have today.

t_ch: 不知那深埋的宝藏，是否有落入旁人之手？
t_en: I wonder... has the treasure buried deep below fallen into another's hands?

t_ch: 哟，{NICKNAME}，好久不见。可惜，大守护者带着那群年轻人出门拜访了。
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}, it's been a while. Unfortunately, the Supreme Guardian is out with the youngsters.

t_ch: 是什么风，把你这位银河间的大人物给吹回来了呀？
t_en: What cosmic wind blew a big shot like you back to our little corner of the universe?

t_ch: 我是来寻宝的。
t_en: I'm here on a treasure hunt.

t_ch: 陪某位大人物到处逛逛。
t_en: Just showing a certain big shot around.

t_ch: 你向这位「地火」首领讲述了克拉肯的故事，以及喷泉下方埋着宝藏的传闻。
t_en: You recount the story of Kraken to the Wildfire leader, including the rumor of a treasure buried beneath the fountain.

t_ch: 噢，还有这事？正好，前段时间市政部门对下水道进行了疏通，挖出来不少奇怪东西。
t_en: Oh, really? Funny you should mention it. The Municipal Department dredged the sewers a while back and dug up a bunch of weird stuff.

t_ch: 看看，是不是你们要找的？
t_en: Take a look. Is this what you're looking for?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 不知道什么时候，水道里住满了这种动物，掀开井盖，爬得到处都是，就像喷泉似的。
t_en: At some point, the sewers got filled with these things. If you lift a manhole cover, they'll come crawling out like a fountain.

t_ch: 好在，下层区多得是{RUBY_B#烹饪}处理{RUBY_E#}它们的办法。
t_en: Good thing is, folks in the Underworld have plenty of ways of... {RUBY_B#cooking}dealing with{RUBY_E#} them.

t_ch: 这就是四大鱼皇的下场吗？
t_en: Is this how the four Great Fish Sovereigns ended up?

t_ch: 变成小众宝藏美食了。
t_en: A local delicacy?

t_ch: 此地极为凶险，我们还是赶紧离开为好。
t_en: This place is treacherous. We should depart at once.

t_ch: （奇怪。就这么一小会儿的工夫，克拉肯究竟跑哪去了。）
t_en: (That's weird. Where'd Kraken go? It's only been a minute.)

t_ch: 成天关在房间里可把我憋坏了，溜出来玩的感觉真好呀。
t_en: Being cooped up in my room all day was getting so stuffy. It feels so good to sneak out and have some fun!

t_ch: 是啊，出门旅行的感觉真好呀。
t_en: Yeah, it's great to get out and travel.

t_ch: 嗯？谁在说话？总感觉嗅到了股淡淡的鱼香味，烤过的那种。
t_en: Huh? Who's talking? I smell something a little fishy... like it's been grilled.

t_ch: 终于…终于见到了，梦中回荡的浪涛声，这就是我心心念念的大海啊——
t_en: Finally... The sound of the waves from my dreams... This is the ocean I've been dreaming of...

t_ch: 珊瑚镌刻历史，洋流同样承载回忆。看，那宏伟景象便是我当年与渊底恶龙缠斗所致。
t_en: Coral etches history, and ocean currents carry memories. Look, that majestic sight was created when I fought the dragon from the abyss.

t_ch: 你望着鳞渊境，不由得陷入沉思。毫无疑问，你知道这壮丽奇景是如何形成的。
t_en: You gaze upon the Scalegorge Waterscape, lost in thought. You knew, without a doubt, the true origin of this spectacular vista.

t_ch: 那么，答案便只有一个了……
t_en: Then there's only one explanation...

t_ch: 你也是冷面小青龙？
t_en: Are you also... Cold Dragon Young?

t_ch: 说说你开海前的最后一句话。
t_en: Tell me your last words before you cleaved the sea.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。这历史性的时刻，克拉肯自然不会忘。那话便是——
t_en: Hahahaha. Of course, I remember that historic moment. I said...

t_ch: 「克拉肯的一小步，幻造种的一大步。」
t_en: "One small step for Kraken, a giant leap for the imagenae."

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你也来看海呀。是有什么烦心事嘛，要不要替你把把脉？
t_en: {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, are you here to see the ocean as well? Is something troubling you? Would you like me to check your pulse?

t_ch: 这位小友年纪虽幼，可看头顶的犄角，身后还附有尾鳍，莫非也是海妖一族？
t_en: This little one may be young, but, judging by the horns on her head and the fin on her back, maybe she's a sea monster, too?

t_ch: 小心点，她就是你说的恶龙。
t_en: Careful now. She's the "dragon from the abyss" you spoke of.

t_ch: 持明算是海妖吗？
t_en: Are Vidyadhara sea monsters?

t_ch: 呸呸呸！什么海妖，你这破罐子再乱说话，看本小姐我一尾巴把你打成粉末！
t_en: Ptooey! Sea monster? You keep spouting nonsense, you old pot, and I'll smash you to pieces with my tail!

t_ch: 你向这位持明龙尊讲述了克拉肯的故事，以及鳞渊境海域曾由他主宰的传奇经历。
t_en: You recount the story of Kraken to this Vidyadhara high elder, including his legendary claim of once ruling over the Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 怪了。我在仙舟行医问诊，见过的人比天舶司秘书还要多，从没听说还有这事。
t_en: That's weird. In all my time practicing medicine on the Xianzhou, I've met more people than a Sky-Faring Commission secretary, yet I've never heard anything about that.

t_ch: 莫非这画出来的大章鱼，活得比持明还久不成？
t_en: You think this octopus from a painting has been around longer than a Vidyadhara?

t_ch: …说不定还真有可能。
t_en: It just might be...

t_ch: 这就是幻造种的种族优势了。
t_en: That's the advantage of being an imagenae.

t_ch: 好哇，那就让本小姐来考考你！咳，听好啦——
t_en: Fine, then I'll test you! Ahem, listen up.

t_ch: 鳞渊境得其名，乃是由于其下封印着曾祸害仙舟的大敌。「鳞」，海怪之古称；「渊」，指的便是底部。你说得出来，这里埋的是谁吗？
t_en: The Scalegorge Waterscape is so named because a great enemy of the Xianzhou is sealed deep below. "Scale" is an ancient term for a sea monster, and "gorge" refers to the abyss. Can you tell me who is buried here?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。此等大事，克拉肯怎么可能忘记。稍等啊，待我回忆下便是。
t_en: Hahahaha. How could I forget something like that? Hold on, let me think...

t_ch: 你当然注意到了，克拉肯正在用眼神偷瞄你，但是否要帮他，就要看你此刻的心情了。
t_en: You notice Kraken stealing glances at you, but whether or not you choose to help him would depend entirely on your mood.

t_ch: …大岁阳浮烟。
t_en: The great heliobus, Cirrus.

t_ch: 不错。正如球棒浣熊所说，此地囚禁的，便是为害四方的「大岁阳浮烟」。
t_en: Correct. As the Baseball Raccoon has stated, the one imprisoned here is none other than the great heliobus, Cirrus, who plagued these lands.

t_ch: …步离战首呼雷。
t_en: The Borisin Warhead, Hoolay.

t_ch: 不错。正如球棒浣熊所说，此地囚禁的，便是为害四方的「布狸战首呼雷」。
t_en: Correct. As the Baseball Raccoon has stated, the one imprisoned here is none other than the Borisin Warhead, Hoolay, who plagued these lands.

t_ch: …十王司首席判官藿藿。
t_en: The chief Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, Huohuo.

t_ch: 不错。正如球棒浣熊所说，此地囚禁的，便是为害四方的「首席判官藿藿」。
t_en: Correct. As the Baseball Raccoon has stated, the one imprisoned here is none other than chief Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, Huohuo, who plagued these lands.

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 莫非…是汪汪丹？
t_en: Is it... Woof Woof Dan?

t_ch: 哼，我就说嘛，鳞渊境哪来的章鱼王，串在长乐天的烧烤摊位上还差不多。
t_en: Hmph, just as I thought. An octopus king in the Scalegorge Waterscape? Please. You'd be more at home on a skewer at a food stall in the Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 你这个说大话不害臊的家伙，按你们二相乐园的规矩，给本小姐沉到海里喝水去吧！
t_en: You shameless liar! By the laws of Planarcadia, I'm sending you to sleep with the fishes!

t_ch: 等…等等！别踢我下去，我怕水，我最怕海了啊！
t_en: W—Wait! Don't send me down there! I'm terrified of water, especially the sea!

t_ch: 堂堂海妖王，居然还怕海？
t_en: The great Sea Monster King is scared of a little water?

t_ch: 你不是海洋恶魔吗？
t_en: Aren't you supposed to be a devil of the ocean?

t_ch: 不听不听！尝尝我尾巴的厉害！
t_en: Enough talk! See how you like a whack from my tail!
Waaaah!

t_ch: 啊，吓晕过去了。真没用。
t_en: And... he fainted. Guess his courage was all talk too.

t_ch: 我早听说那个国家的妖怪很狡猾，肚子里全是黑水！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}得当心呀。
t_en: I've heard the strangeling from that place are cunning and full of tricks! You should watch your back, {F#Big Sister}{M#Big Brother}.

t_ch: 好啦，我要回去继续问诊了，你自己好好散心，不打扰啦！
t_en: Well, I must be getting back to my patients. Take it easy and have a nice walk. See ya!

t_ch: 好多蓝色，全是水。我这是…掉海底去了？
t_en: Blue, everywhere... and it's all water. Did I somehow end up at the bottom of the ocean?

t_ch: 你被沉进鸽川了。
t_en: Yeah, you're in Dovebrook now.

t_ch: 海底不是海妖王的舒适区吗？
t_en: Shouldn't a Sea Monster King feel right at home at the bottom of the ocean?

t_ch: 呼…罢了，罢了。既然被戳穿，都到这个地步，我也没什么好隐瞒的了。
t_en: *sigh* Fine... you caught me. There's no point in pretending anymore.

t_ch: 看海的心愿已经实现，旅途最后，请带我回去吧。
t_en: Well, I got to see the ocean. The journey's over. Please, take me home.

t_ch: 海鲜怎么又售罄了…
t_en: All out of seafood? Again?

t_ch: 问店主也不吱声，唉。
t_en: I asked the shopkeeper, but he just gave me the silent treatment. Oh well.

t_ch: 你将眼睛重新贴了回去，不多时，那只张牙舞爪的大章鱼再次张口了。
t_en: You stick the eyes back on. After a moment, the great, menacing octopus speaks again.

t_ch: 抱歉，我骗了你。那些故事都不是真的，是我临时编造的虚言。
t_en: I'm sorry. I lied to you. None of those stories were true. I just made them all up.

t_ch: 究竟有多少是假话？
t_en: Just how many of those were lies?

t_ch: 好啊，竟然敢骗球棒浣熊！
t_en: Oh yeah? You dare trick the Baseball Raccoon!

t_ch: 克拉肯…我，的确诞生自人们对大海的恐惧，在二相乐园遥远的过去，我也曾是兴风作浪的{RUBY_B#深海恶魔}大妖{RUBY_E#}，令无数妖怪闻风丧胆。
t_en: I, Kraken... Indeed, I was born from people's fear of the sea. In Planarcadia's distant past, I was a {RUBY_B#Deep Sea Devil}great strangeling{RUBY_E#}, aggressive and magnificent, making countless strangelings tremble at the mere mention of my name.

t_ch: 唯一的不同便是…<color=#dbc291ff>其实，我从未见过真正的海。</color>
t_en: The only difference is... <color=#dbc291ff>Actually, I've never seen a real ocean.</color>

t_ch: 我由恐惧大海的情感幻化出来，也为这种强烈的恐惧所禁锢。我…说来可笑，毁天灭地的海妖王，却害怕海洋，只能永远活在陆地上。
t_en: I was born from the fear of the ocean, and I remain imprisoned by this intense terror. I... it's laughable really, the almighty Sea Demon King who could destroy the world, is afraid of the ocean and can only live on land forever.

t_ch: 而且，这是我第一次离开二相乐园。将积攒的愿力悉数耗尽，才将这双眼睛送了出去。
t_en: Besides, this is my first time leaving Planarcadia. I had to use up all my accumulated Wishpower just to send these eyes away.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。「克拉肯的一小步，幻造种的一大步」——这话倒是没说错。
t_en: Hahaha. "One small step for Kraken, one giant leap for imagenae." We can't argue with that.

t_ch: 为什么非要去看海呢？
t_en: Why do you insist on seeing the ocean?

t_ch: …你不是怕海么？
t_en: ...Aren't you afraid of the ocean?

t_ch: 因为…我…可能，<color=#dbc291ff>就快消失了。</color>
t_en: Because... I... might <color=#dbc291ff>disappear soon.</color>

t_ch: 突然的话语，像是水底缓慢升起的气泡，「嘭」地一下陡然炸开。
t_en: The sudden words, like bubbles slowly rising from the depths, burst open with a "pop."

t_ch: 时代在发展，二相乐园无时无刻不在改变，过去叱咤风云的海妖，如今只能在这看店。
t_en: Times change, and Planarcadia is constantly evolving. Once a mighty sea demon who could shake the world, now I'm just here minding the store.

t_ch: 我…能感受到，组成我的愿力正在发生变化，「克拉肯」不再因为人们的恐惧而存在，取而代之的，是更复杂却寻常的琐事——
t_en: I... can feel it. The Wishpower that makes up my being is changing. "Kraken" no longer exist because of people's fear, but instead, because of something more complex yet mundane...

t_ch: 顾客的喜爱，店面的人气，商业宣传带来的流量…这些才是现在的我。
t_en: Customer satisfaction, store popularity, business traffic from advertising... This is who I am now.

t_ch: 作为海妖的部分，已经弱到几乎看不见了。
t_en: The sea demon part has grown so weak, it's almost invisible.

t_ch: 你会变成尘灵吗？
t_en: Will you become a wispae?

t_ch: 不会吧。我并非失去了愿力支撑，而是愿力来源发生了变化，用漫画里的说法…大概就是「洗白」。
t_en: No way. I haven't lost my Wishpower. It's just that my Wishpower source has changed. To put it in comic terms... I guess you could say I've had a "redemption arc."

t_ch: 你还是原来的克拉肯吗？
t_en: Are you still the same old Kraken?

t_ch: 我…不知道。愿力来源发生变化，我的性格、记忆、乃至能力都会随之改变。
t_en: I... don't know. When my Wishpower source changes, my personality, memories, and even abilities change with it.

t_ch: 等到那时候，我可能都不再能记起你，还有我们共同的这趟旅行了。
t_en: By then, I might not even remember you, or this journey we shared together.

t_ch: 无论如何，感谢你能带上我的眼睛。在「克拉肯」消失前，我终于…见过真正的海了。
t_en: Anyway, thank you for bringing my eyes along. Before I vanish, I finally... got to see the real ocean.

t_ch: 喔，刚打捞的海鲜！
t_en: Oh, fresh seafood straight from the ocean!

t_ch: 不愧是克拉肯，真厉害！
t_en: As expected of Kraken, that's incredible!

t_ch: 这就是必吃榜的实力啊！
t_en: Now that's what I call a must-try list!

t_ch: 欢迎光临克拉肯酒馆，每日海鲜不限量供应，现捞现卖，保证合您口味！
t_en: Welcome to Kraken's Tavern! We offer unlimited fresh seafood daily, caught and served on demand. I guarantee it'll be to your liking!

t_ch: 克拉肯，我有问题想请教！兴风作浪的大海妖，现在却经营起了小酒馆，你是怎么实现成功转型的呢？
t_en: Kraken, I've got a question for you! You were once a fearsome sea monster, yet now you're running a tavern. How did you manage such a successful career change?

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，那还不简单。只须记住这个经营理念就好——
t_en: Hahahaha, that's easy peasy! Just remember this business philosophy:

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「克拉肯啊，是由酱油、香辛料和所有美味的东西构成的。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Kraken is made of soy sauce, spices, and all things delicious."</color>

t_ch: 最终我手执八尺利刃，将它连同海面劈为两段。
t_en: Finally, wielding my eight-foot blade, I cleaved both it and the sea's surface in two.

t_ch: 这不是我最喜欢的{NICKNAME}老伙计嘛，来坐近一点，想喝点什么，别客气，我老桑博请客，哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Well, if it isn't my favorite old pal {NICKNAME}! Come, sit closer. What can I get you to drink? Don't be shy now: Your friend Sampo's treating, hahaha!

t_ch: 不会只是和我见面这么简单吧？
t_en: You can't be here just to see me, right?

t_ch: 嗐，我们俩是什么关系啊，只是见个面、聊个天，未免也太见外了吧。
t_en: Hey now, what kind of relationship do we have here? Just meeting up for a little chat. No need to be so formal with me!

t_ch: 当然还得拜托你个事儿，才算是周全嘛，哈哈。
t_en: And of course, I've got one tiny favor to ask ya. Just to make everything perfect, haha.

t_ch: 钟珊珊，给我的老伙计来一杯「永远爱你，老桑博」吧。
t_en: Zhongshanshan, get my old pal here a glass of "Love You Forever, Sampo."

t_ch: 来杯最贵的饮料，账记在他头上…
t_en: Get me the most expensive drink, put it on his tab...

t_ch: 老伙计，你还真是不客气啊…那个什么，我刚听说酒馆最贵的饮料已经卖光了。
t_en: My friend, you're really not holding back, are you... Er, by the way, I just heard that the tavern's most expensive drink is sold out.

t_ch: …真的卖光了吗？我是酒保，我怎么不知道。
t_en: ...Sold out? I'm the drinksmith, how come I don't know about this?

t_ch: 真的卖光了，你是酒保，你当然不知道。
t_en: It's true. It's sold out. You're just a drinksmith, of course you wouldn't know.
